meta.name: Additional Equipment Reference - Manual Material Weighing
meta.description: Reference data untuk pembacaan manual material weighing/raw material consumption dari PLC SCADA
meta.purpose: TASK 5 - Manual Material Consumption Tracking (separate from equipment failure monitoring)
meta.memory_layout: D9000: BATCH | D9001-D9008: NO-MO | D9009: NO-Product | D9010-D9011: Consumption | D9012: Handshake

ADDITIONAL.description: Batch/lot number for material weighing entry (INT, 1 word)
Product template ID in Odoo (INT, 1 word)
Material consumption quantity (REAL, 2 words, scaled by 100)
Handshake flag: 0=not read by Middleware, 1=read by Middleware

batch_number.description: Batch/lot identifier for manual weighing (1 word, INT)

mo_id.description: Manufacturing Order ID from Odoo (16 chars, 8 words)

product_id.description: Product ID untuk endpoint material-consumption (1 word, INT)

consumption_qty.description: Material consumption quantity (2 words, REAL, scaled for PLC integer precision)

handshake_flag.description: Bidirectional handshake: Middleware→PLC marks as read after processing

notes: Manual Material Weighing data is entered by operators at weigh scale station in PLC
Data includes MO ID, Product ID, and actual consumption quantity
Handshake flag D9012 prevents duplicate consumption entries in Odoo
Memory area D9000-D9012 (13 words) is SEPARATE from Equipment Failure (D8000-D8022)
TASK 5 reads this area periodically and syncs consumption data to Odoo
Consumption quantity uses scale=100 (contoh PLC 82500 = 825 kg actual)
Numeric fields: BATCH (INT, 1 word), NO-Product (INT, 1 word), Consumption (REAL, 2 words)
NO-Product uses scale=1 (no decimal), Consumption uses scale=100 for decimal precision
